scripts.// dev_comment: RUN LOCALLY: This starts your project on your computer and injects your secret settings from the .env file before compiling your code.
scripts.// build_comment: PRODUCTION COMPILATION: This prepares your system to be deployed on the web. 1. It builds your frontend screens using Vite. 2. It compiles your server code into a small, fast package inside the 'dist' folder.
scripts.// start_comment: RUN ON CLOUD ENGINE: This is the command the hosting server (like Render) uses to run your website. It opens up the compiled production code file we created during the build step.
scripts.// clean_comment: RESET SCRIPTS: Deletes old temporary build folders so you can compile a completely fresh copy.
scripts.// lint_comment: QUALITY CHECK: Scans your code files for errors.
